artifacts.summary: Comprehensive analysis of cross-platform install wizard: current architecture (8 scripts, 750 lines, all macOS-specific), complete package mapping across brew/apt/pacman for ~30 tools, TTY/headless interaction inventory (8 interaction points categorized), generalized interactive_step pattern extending DEFERRED_HINTS, R compilation timeout strategies (PPM binaries + per-package timeouts), task 31 design decisions to preserve (13 invariants), and NixOS detect-and-skip recommendation
